headline: If You Invested $100 In Lam Research Stock 10 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 29.56% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 42.77%. Currently, Lam Research has a market capitalization of $401.38

headline: Price Prediction: ASML Could Hit $2,000+ in 12 Months With AI Demand Fueling Lithography Growth
summary: AI capex is pulling forward lithography demand faster than Wall Street expected, and ASML just raised guidance again, putting a price level few analysts have publicly named within striking distance.

headline: What's going on in today's pre-market session: S&P500 movers
summary: The US market is yet to commence its session on Thursday, but let's get a preview of the pre-market session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the early market movements.
